title: Marketplace Manager - Zepto South Asia Partners - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Zepto South Asia Partners - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Zepto South Asia Partners. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Marketplace Manager to strengthen our Indore-based team.

About Zepto South Asia Partners:
Zepto South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zepto South Asia Partners!
